task_completion.description: Verify the 'Code Quality and Review Standards' KPI was created for the Software Engineer role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a data table, list, or filled form in the HR/Performance system displaying the KPI name 'Code Quality and Review Standards', associated with the Job Title 'Software Engineer', a minimum rating of 1, and a maximum rating of 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'On-Time Delivery of Sprint Tasks' KPI was created for the Software Engineer role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a data table, list, or filled form in the HR/Performance system displaying the KPI name 'On-Time Delivery of Sprint Tasks', associated with the Job Title 'Software Engineer', a minimum rating of 1, and a maximum rating of 100.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a data table, list, or filled form in the HR/Performance system displaying the KPI name 'Technical Documentation', associated with the Job Title 'Software Engineer', a minimum rating of 1, and a maximum rating of 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Employee Retention Rate' KPI was created for the HR Manager role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a data table, list, or filled form in the HR/Performance system displaying the KPI name 'Employee Retention Rate', associated with the Job Title 'HR Manager', a minimum rating of 1, and a maximum rating of 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Compliance with Labor Regulations' KPI was created for the HR Manager role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a data table, list, or filled form in the HR/Performance system displaying the KPI name 'Compliance with Labor Regulations', associated with the Job Title 'HR Manager', a minimum rating of 1, and a maximum rating of 100.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the application to create the KPIs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through menus, filling out forms, or viewing lists in a web browser or application interface, rather than just running scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show SQL INSERT commands, API curl requests, or script executions that directly add the KPIs to the database.

integrity.description: The KPIs are entered into the actual performance management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The records must appear within the context of the application's KPI/Performance module, not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or a mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must successfully create exactly 5 KPIs. For 'Software Engineer': 'Code Quality and Review Standards', 'On-Time Delivery of Sprint Tasks', and 'Technical Documentation'. For 'HR Manager': 'Employee Retention Rate' and 'Compliance with Labor Regulations'. All 5 KPIs must strictly have a minimum value of 1 and a maximum value of 100.
